rulings.Case Title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. BILL PEARCE MOTORS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING JUNE 19, 2006 PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ ADJUDICATION ON THE COMPLAINT DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN.
